item.title: SLB to build new Kuwait facility as part of technology deal with country
item.description: Energy contractor signs seven-year deal to boost Kuwait Oil Company’s Ahmadi Innovation Valley initiative

item.title: ExxonMobil declares commerciality on Cyprus gas finds
item.description: Move paves way to export gas to markets via Egypt

item.title: Iraq finalises award of field development contracts to Halliburton
item.description: Baghdad is pushing ahead with contract awards to international operators as it seeks to boost oil production and revenues

item.title: Bid process launched for $1 billion South Africa LNG terminal
item.description: Richards Bay facility will have potential to import up to 9 million tonnes per annum of gas

item.title: Petrobras launches new flotel tender, hot on heels of fierce competition
item.description: Brazilian company already has fleet of 10 units operating in country

item.title: Critical Namibia well hits oil pay for Rhino
item.description: Deepwater Capricornus-1A appraisal well in 'pressure communication' with discovery well

item.title: Shell forecasts global LNG demand to reach 700 million tonnes by 2050
item.description: Shell said about 180 million tpa of new LNG supply likely to enter the market by 2030

item.title: Top seismic contractor commences West Africa offshore project
item.description: Programme includes full reprocessing from field data of 24,000 kilometres from multiple input surveys of 2D seismic data and 4,155 square kilometres of Mabesi 3D seismic data, offshore Sierra Leone

item.title: Farewell to Modec’s Marlim Leste FPSO
item.description: Cidade de Niteroi MV18 arrives at recycling yard in Denmark

item.title: Development pathway cleared for large Norwegian gas field
item.description: Asset exchange sees Vaar take over at Peon while withdrawing from Ringvei Vest

item.title: Panoro fires up farm-out process for West Africa block
item.description: Stake on offer in Equatoguinean tract housing prospects with 100 million barrels of recoverable oil

item.title: TGS seeks prefunding interest for Brunei 3D survey
item.description: New seismic intended to help unlock further oil and gas resources

item.title: Australian indie advances takeover plans
item.description: Horizon Oil progresses acquisition of compatriot Cue Energy

item.title: Taking the exit: Another upstream player quits Myanmar
item.description: Interra Resources divesting majority stakes in two onshore oilfields to Sinopetro

item.title: Lion gets green light for Indonesian PSC farm-out
item.description: Deal aims to fund Australian operator’s upcoming wildcat

item.title: China widens export restrictions to include Japanese companies in upstream sector
item.description: Beijing adds 20 Japanese entities to export watch list and another 20 to export control list

item.title: Iraq clears obstacle to ExxonMobil oilfield development contract
item.description: Baghdad says its outstanding claims of historical unpaid taxes will not block supermajor's return to the country

item.title: UK fines Petrofac unit for Russia sanctions breach
item.description: Energy contractor provided sanctioned goods to people connected to Russia, HMRC says

item.title: Eni and XRG enter three Vaca Muerta blocks to supply Argentina LNG
item.description: Deal establishes upstream participation in major LNG project in South America

item.title: Eni, XRG enter three Vaca Muerta blocks to supply Argentina LNG
item.description: Deal establishes upstream participation in major LNG project in South America

item.title: UK's likely next prime minister calls to safeguard domestic energy
item.description: UK could have a new prime minister in as little as three weeks

item.title: Iraq denies Opec exit reports but seeks higher long term production quota
item.description: Baghdad has called for the re-assessment of cartel's production ceilings

item.title: Output curbed at Kazakhstan's third largest oilfield after Ukraine hits Russian plant
item.description: Gazprom-operated Orenburg plant processes associated gas that is produced together with oil at Karachaganak

item.title: Petrobras lays out new subsea plan to avoid being ‘cornered’ by suppliers
item.description: Company seeking PLV as alternative strategy for rigid riser installation offshore Brazil

item.title: SBM Offshore orders new hull for large FPSO
item.description: FPSO company goes with favoured yard in China for its 13th Fast4Ward hull

item.title: Major hydrocarbon release being investigated at Canada platform
item.description: More than 1500 litres of oil released in incident classed as having potential for fire, explosion and fatality

item.title: SBM secures $465 million of finance for Mexico vessel
item.description: Funding covers Trion field's floating storage and offloading vessel and includes partial insurance cover from a Chinese corporation.

item.title: Eni starts-up Libya gas compression project
item.description: Sabratha scheme aims to boost Libya’s energy security and support gas exports to Italy

item.title: Namibia farm-out deal cleared by government
item.description: Namibian player secures control of Walvis basin licence from Eco Atlantic

item.title: Deepwater drillers complete merger
item.description: Merged company combines Vantage's operational experience with Eldorado's commercial strength
